nasb.text: The priest who offers it for sin shall eat it. It shall be eaten in a holy place, in the court of the tent of meeting.

esv.text: The priest who offers it for sin shall eat it. In a holy place it shall be eaten, in the court of the tent of meeting.

cnv.text: 獻這贖罪祭的祭司要吃這祭牲；在會幕院子裡的聖潔地方吃。

ccb.text: 献这祭的祭司要在会幕院子里的圣洁之处吃这祭牲。
